results.rendered_html: pra-˚bhṛti ind. (after an abl. adv. or ifc.) beginning with, from—forward or upward, since,  GṛŚrS. ;  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c. (e.g. bālyāt prabhṛti, ‘from boyhood upwards’; janma-pr˚, ‘from birth’; adya pr˚, ‘beginning from today, henceforth’; tataḥ or tadā pr˚, ‘thenceforth’ &c.)

— 2〉 Wurf, Schlag: vajrasya  ṚV. 5,32,7 . [Page4-1044]
